item.title: Chronic nonbacterial osteomyelitis and inflammatory bowel disease in children: A French national cohort.
item.description: Journal of pediatric gastroenterology and nutrition - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) and chronic nonbacterial osteomyelitis (CNO) is a rare association. Its prevalence is probably underestimated due to low awareness among clinicians. The aim of this...

item.title: [Expert consensus on endoscopic diagnosis and treatment for inflammatory bowel disease in children (2026)].
item.description: Zhonghua er ke za zhi = Chinese journal of pediatrics - 炎症性肠病（IBD）是一种免疫介导的慢性肠道炎症性疾病，病程迁延、反复发作，可影响患儿生长发育及生活质量，加重家庭的经济负担。消化内镜在其诊断、病情评估、疗效监测及并发症处理中具有关键作用。当前，我国儿童IBD内镜诊疗实践仍存在不规范之处，尚无系统、全面的儿童IBD内镜诊疗专家共识。为此，中华医学会儿科学分会消化学组与中华儿科杂志编辑委员会组织专家制订了“儿童炎症性肠病内镜诊疗专家共识（20...
